question: My paycheck amount is incorrect
answer: Collect pay period issue type and employee summary then route to payroll

question: My direct deposit did not arrive
answer: Confirm pay date bank name and whether account details changed then escalate to payroll

question: I see an unexpected deduction
answer: Collect deduction label pay period and screenshot if available then route to payroll

question: Can you change my salary
answer: Do not make compensation changes escalate compensation disputes to HR operations
